title: Vintage Panorama
description: The Pre-1.13 Panorama, but With a New Coat of Paint
body:
## The original pre-1.13 Panorama with a fresh coat of paint!

The Panorama as it currently is:
![Panorama in its current state](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48db9ab1fce5b1f228fc56581b0a70072f7ee6dd_0.webp)

The screenshots used for the packs creation were made using the mods: 
 - Modern Beta
 - Simple Fog Control
